welcome.tagline:
Your keys, your coins.
Simple as a tap.

settings.title: Settings
settings.passkeyHint: This service stores your passkey's public key for cross-device sign-in. Vela Wallet never has access to your passkey's private key.
settings.warningText: The Passkey Index service is unreachable. Wallet creation and sign-in require this service. Please configure a reachable endpoint below.

create.accountNamePlaceholder: Enter a name for your account
create.accountNameHint: This name is stored with your public key on-chain for cross-device sign-in.

reassure.title: No seed phrase to lose
reassure.point1: Your key is created and held by Face ID / fingerprint — never typed, never shown.
reassure.point2: It syncs via iCloud Keychain or Google Password Manager — sign in on a new device to restore.

create.ack0: This is a self-custodial wallet. Your passkey private key is managed by your device's password manager (iCloud Keychain / Google Password Manager). Vela Wallet cannot access or recover it.
create.ack1: If you lose your device, you can restore your wallet on a new device through your iCloud or Google account.
create.ack2: If your iCloud or Google account is compromised, your wallet control may also be compromised. Protect it with a strong password and 2FA.
create.successMessage: Your address works on all {{count}} supported networks.
create.verifyHint: Tap below to verify your identity works before using the wallet.
create.syncFailedMessage: Wallet created, but your public key wasn't synced to the server. You won't be able to sign in on other devices until this is resolved.
create.syncFailedHint: Check your network, or configure a custom endpoint below.
create.statusVerifyCancelled: Verification was cancelled. Please try again.
create.alertNotSupportedBody: Biometric authentication is not available on this device.

login.alertNotSupportedBody: Biometric authentication is not available on this device.
login.alertIncompatibleBody: Your device's identity provider is not compatible with Vela Wallet. Please switch to Google Password Manager in system settings and try again.
login.alertNotFoundBody:
No wallet was found for this identity.

Possible reasons:
• You haven't created a wallet yet
• Your identity hasn't synced to this device (check iCloud / Google settings)
• The public key server is unreachable

Try creating a new wallet, or ensure your identity provider (Face ID / fingerprint) is synced across devices.
login.alertSignInFailedBody:
{{message}}

Make sure your device has Face ID, Touch ID, or fingerprint set up and try again.
login.alertIncompatibleBodyCreate: Your device's identity provider is not compatible with this wallet. Please switch to Google Password Manager in system settings and try again.
